mapper.select: SELECT z.*, p.PLANT_NM, w.WAREHOUSE_NM, c.COM_NM AS ZONE_TYPE_NM FROM MCS_ZONE z INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON z.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD INNER JOIN MST_WAREHOUSE w ON z.WAREHOUSE_CD = w.WAREHOUSE_CD LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_ZONE_TYPE' AND z.ZONE_TYPE = c.COM_CD WHERE z.ZONE_ID = #{zoneId}
SELECT * FROM MCS_ZONE WHERE WAREHOUSE_CD = #{warehouseCd} AND ZONE_CD = #{zoneCd}
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_ZONE SET ZONE_NM = #{zoneNm}, ZONE_TYPE = #{zoneType}, SORT_SEQ = #{sortSeq}, USE_YN = #{useYn}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE ZONE_ID = #{zoneId}
